summary_markdown:
## What this issue is about
This issue is focused on moving the content from the `plone.behavior` README file into the documentation section at [6.docs.plone.org/backend/behaviors.html](https://6.docs.plone.org/backend/behaviors.html). After the move, the README should link to the new documentation page.

## What needs to be done
1. Review the current `plone.behavior` README content.
2. Transfer relevant information into the mentioned documentation page.
3. Update the README to replace its content with a link to the new documentation.

## Helpful background
This issue has some existing discussions, indicating that some content may have already been moved. However, there’s still a need to ensure everything is in order. Understanding "behaviors" in Plone may require additional time and familiarity with the framework.

## Good first steps
1. Familiarize yourself with the concept of behaviors in Plone if you're not already.
2. Check the current state of the `plone.behavior` README and the target documentation.
3. Consider reaching out for guidance from experienced contributors, such as @jensens or @gforcada, as they can help clarify any uncertainties. Don't hesitate to ask questions to drop any barriers to your understanding!
